# QuotingHub

QuotingHub is quoting and project management software built specifically for interior designers and design studios in South Africa.

## What QuotingHub Does

QuotingHub helps interior designers create professional quotes, invoices, and purchase orders without spreadsheets. It handles real-time supplier pricing, automatic VAT and deposit calculations, PDF generation, and email delivery — all in one place.

## Key Features

- Itemised quote and invoice creation with real-time pricing
- Automatic VAT (15%) and deposit calculations
- Professionally branded PDF generation for quotes, invoices, and purchase orders
- Supplier management with per-supplier markup settings
- Client management with full contact and VAT details
- Purchase orders generated per supplier from a single project
- Team collaboration with role-based access (admin and designer roles)
- Project pipeline with kanban-style status tracking
- Price list import and management
- Email delivery of quotes and invoices directly to clients

## Who It Is For

Interior designers, interior decorators, and design studios based in South Africa who need to manage client projects, create accurate quotes, and send professional documents to clients and suppliers.

## Pages

- [Home](https://quotinghub.co.za): Overview of the product
- [Sign Up](https://quotinghub.co.za/signup): Create a new account
- [Log In](https://quotinghub.co.za/login): Access your studio

## About

QuotingHub is built and maintained in South Africa. It is designed for the local interior design market with ZAR pricing, VAT-compliant invoicing, and South African banking detail fields on all documents.

Contact: quotinghub.co.za
